sql_array: INSERT INTO time_series_data (timestamp_col) SELECT generate_series('2023-01-01 00:00:00', '2023-01-02 00:00:00', interval '1 hour');
UPDATE time_series_data SET timestamp_col = timestamp_col + interval '1 day' WHERE timestamp_col < '2023-01-02 00:00:00';
SELECT timestamp_col FROM time_series_data WHERE timestamp_col BETWEEN '2023-01-01 00:00:00' AND '2023-01-02 00:00:00';
